heading: Amount of indemnity
label: 2365 Amount of indemnity
notes: Transfer of FunctionsAtomic Energy Commission abolished and functions transferred by sections 5814 and 5841 of this title. See also Transfer of Functions notes set out under those sections.

children.text: which was in the amount of the purchase price from the Commission and provided for equal monthly payments of principal and interest over a period of twenty years computed on the basis of the average interest and other charges recorded for property of the same class at the community; and
on which all payments due to the date when notice was received by the Commission had been made.
